author.bio: Filecoin is a data storage network backed by an application token. The Filecoin token sale ended in September 2017. Sites purporting to sell Filecoin are SCAMS.
author.name: Filecoin

content.text: Want to help us build the future? Check out our getting started guide to learn how to contribute to the Filecoin Project! http://filecoin.io/blog/getting-started-with-filecoin-repos-and-devnets/ #community #opensource
